'''''Adventures Unlimited'' 2''' was a roleplaying magazine published in the Summer of [[1995]]. It contained many [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] articles, including an adventure for [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]. The article was called "[[Forbidden Fruit]]" and was written by [[Nigel D. Findley]]. He died a month after submitting it.
